_note: Hand-authored stage ladder (CC-09). Bands tile weight_lbs from -inf to +inf; the current rung resolves from real weight. Stable config — not a data claim.

stage_ladder.headline: Just get to the gym.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: At this weight the win is showing up at all. Everything else is noise right now.
cares_most: slow cardio the joints can take
stage_ladder.plan: Slow steady cardio plus basic full-body resistance. Protect joints at high load; build the habit before the stimulus.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Three sessions a week for three straight weeks unlocks the 'build' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: Now we add a little structure.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: The habit is real and the body can take more. Time to make the work progressive.
stage_ladder.plan: Introduce light periodization and a Zone 2 base; nudge load up week over week.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Consistent progressive overload for four weeks, ACWR in range, unlocks 'develop'.

stage_ladder.headline: Train like an athlete in training.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Real fitness is accruing. We can periodize properly and chase adaptation, not just attendance.
stage_ladder.plan: Structured blocks with intensity where recovery allows; defend the cardio base.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: HR-recovery trend improving over a block while load climbs unlocks 'refine'.

stage_ladder.headline: Dial it in.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Lean and capable. Now it's about quality, durability, and holding the gains.
stage_ladder.plan: Sharpen intensity, manage fatigue tightly, keep the engine and the joints healthy for the long arc.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: This is the maintenance rung — the goal is to stay here.
